fields.name: flammability
fields.notes: flammability above 0.3 makes this eligible for item burners.

fields.name: charge
fields.notes: how electrically potent this item is.

fields.name: cost
fields.notes: base material cost of this item, used for calculating place times 1 cost = 1 tick added to build time

fields.name: healthScaling
fields.notes: When this item is present in the build cost, a block's default health is multiplied by 1 + scaling, where 'scaling' is summed together for all item requirement types.

fields.name: lowPriority
fields.notes: if true, this item is of the lowest priority to drills.

fields.name: transitionFrames
fields.notes: Number of generated transition frames between each frame

fields.name: buildable
fields.notes: If true, this material is used by buildings. If false, this material will be incinerated in certain cores.
